3316930.name: Just Up
3316930.description: This game consists of reaching as high as possible, there are different levels and an infinite mode where you will see who is the king of the heights. You can jump infinitely as long as you don't touch the forbidden blocks that will nullify your power to jump and shoot. You will find enemies that you must avoid or eliminate since they can get you into trouble.
3316930.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
